title: Identification Cards - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Identification Cards 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues ntification Cards Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARC OF BENTON COUNTY COMMCARD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a program meant to facilitate understanding and effective communication techniques between an individual with a developmental disability and another person. Assistance is given to acquire an identification card with information about a person's diagnosis, address, advocate contacts, behavioral presentations, communication accomodations, and a sample stress-diffusing topic. Applicants will be required to attend a training session to practice the process with uniformed helping professionals. 928 NW Beca Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 753-1711 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FISH OF LEBANON BASIC NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance, utility assistance, heating fuel assistance, prescription assistance, and clothing. Also offers financial assistance to obtain a valid ID card or driver's license through the Oregon Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV). Assistance is available once per year for each service. 145 W Ash Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 259-3200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MEXICAN CONSULATE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Issues and renews passports and matrícula consular cards. Issues student, work, and retiree visas, and provides assistance with other documents. 1305 SW 12th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Consulate hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturday-Sunday appointments available by request Mexitel phone hours: Monday-Friday 6am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-4pm Email (503) 274-1442 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MEXICAN CONSULATE MOBILE CONSULATE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a "mobile consulate" at pop-up locations throughout the state during set dates and times. 1305 SW 12th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Hours vary location Email (424) 309-0009 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and resource navigation including finding gender-affirming healthcare providers, food, housing, medical supplies and obtaining identification documents. 260 SW Madison Avenue Suite 110 Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Individuals who are queer, transgender, non-binary, intersex, gender non-conforming, or intersex and their parents/guardians or close relatives or kinship Hours: Sunday-Friday noon-5pm or by appointment Email (541) 264-1973 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OREGON STATE DMV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Issues drivers licenses, driving permits, and ID cards. Also, does vehicle licensing and registration. The Limited Vision Condition Program provides an opportunity for individuals with a limited vision condition who use a bioptic telescopic lens to be eligible for restricted driving privileges in Oregon. The At-Risk Driver Program evaluates reports about drivers when there is a concern about their ability to operate a motor vehicle safely. The Remission of Fine Orders and Driver License Reinstatement Opportunity forgives fines and fees due to traffic violations that caused legacy suspensions of driver’s licenses before October 1, 2020. 1905 Lana Avenue NE Salem, OR 97314 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by location (503) 945-5000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARC OF BENTON COUNTY COMMCARD PROGRAM FISH OF LEBANON BASIC NEEDS MEXICAN CONSULATE MEXICAN CONSULATE MID-WILLAMETTE TRANSGENDER SUPPORT NETWORK CASE MANAGEMENT AND RESOURCE DISPATCHING OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OREGON STATE DMV
